description: The issue was addressed with improved checks. This issue is fixed in macOS Ventura 13.5, Safari 16.6, watchOS 9.6, iOS 16.6 and iPadOS 16.6, tvOS 16.6, iOS 15.7.8 and iPadOS 15.7.8. Processing web content may disclose sensitive information.
